name: Alyssa Farah Griffin
role: White House Director of Strategic Communications
summary: Former White House communications director and co-host of The View who said she is 'genuinely afraid' of Trump and voted for Kamala Harris in 2024.

keyStatements.quote: Just to be honest, I'm genuinely afraid of him.
keyStatements.context: The View discussion about Trump and retaliation

keyStatements.quote: For the first time in my life, I voted for a Democrat. I voted for Kamala Harris.

timeline.event: Became Press Secretary to Vice President Pence
Became White House Director of Strategic Communications
Said she was 'genuinely afraid' of Trump on The View
timeline.significance: Public warning about a second Trump term

timeline.event: Said she voted for Kamala Harris
timeline.significance: First time voting for a Democrat

credibility.background: Former Trump White House official, co-host of The View, Republican communications strategist
positions: White House Director of Strategic Communications (2020)

oppositionReasons: Said she is 'genuinely afraid' of Trump
Warned about retaliation if Trump returned to office
Voted for Kamala Harris instead of Trump in 2024

sources.title: ‘The View’ Host Alyssa Farah Griffin Says She’s ‘Genuinely Afraid’ of Trump
The View: Alyssa Farah Griffin Admits She Voted for Harris
